_doc: Agent A prep for owner's 4-gate test (10->50->500->1000). Owner approved OPT-3 depth, torch-GPU, AP->TP ASR. Statuses ⬜🔄✅⛔.

prep.note: --persist-depth-maps flag (default off): maps transient for shot_quality/frames_composition, not persisted. 11x disk. Owner approved if full maps don't add quality (they don't for models; consumers get maps in-run).
torch cu121 (driver 550=CUDA12.4 compat) or Triton export -> scene + inprocess-torch on GPU. Owner: делай.
Wire AP asr_extractor -> doc.asr -> TP. Owner: строй. Unblocks 7 TP components.
Component list as config (not hardcoded 7) + AP/TP venv support.
apt: ffmpeg time bc libarchive13 python3-numpy. Else Triton fails / metrics break.
For 500/1000 if disk needs it (with OPT-3 maybe not needed). Adapt Fetcher hf_queues.
Run 10/50/500/1000 with gen_report per gate. Raise pod self when ready.
